arts.ttl: D’Aversa: ‘We must bring the same Intensity as in Bergamo for Genoa match’
arts.sum: Empoli's head coach, Roberto D'Aversa, addressed the media in a press conference ahead of their upcoming match against Genoa. Reflecting on his team's performance and goals, D'Aversa emphasized the importance of maintaining high intensity. arts.ttl: Serie A | Empoli v Genoa: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: As Empoli prepare to close out the year, they face a challenging situation with their injury list ahead of their match with Genoa. Pietro Pellegri and Ola Solbakken lead a group of sidelined players that also includes Szymon Zurkowski, Tyronne Ebuehi, Saba Sazonov, and Nicolas Haas. The post Serie A | Empoli v Genoa: Probable starting lineups appeared first on FootItalia.com.

Genoa are unbeaten in their last nine matches against Empoli in Serie A (W4 D5), drawing each of the last four; the Grifone could draw more consecutive games against a single opponent in the competition for the first time since the period between 1983 and 1990 against Fiorentina (five in that case). Considering the last match of the calendar year in Serie A, Genoa have won only one of their last 15 games (D5 L9): 2-1 against Spezia on 23rd December 2020.

Empoli are coming from a 3-2 defeat to Atalanta in the previous round, which left them five points clear of the relegation zone. On the other hand, Genoa's improved efforts in the second half on Satu...

arts.ttl: Serie A | Empoli v Genoa: Match Preview
arts.sum: As the curtain falls on 2024, Empoli and Genoa prepare to face off in a pivotal Serie A encounter at the Stadio Carlo Castellani on Saturday afternoon. Both sides enter the match looking to bounce back from recent defeats against title contenders, with Empoli narrowly losing to league leaders Atalanta and Genoa falling to Napoli.
